description:
Advances: mutagen.coverage

Deliverable: migrate .spec/specs/coverage.spec.md to the SpecLedEx schema:
- spec-scenarios block: reshape each scenario to given:/when:/then: arrays (bespoke shape fails parse with 'expected array').
- spec-verification block: replace execute:/source_file: stubs with command: and target: entries; every requirement gets a verification entry.
- spec-meta: flip status: draft -> active once the file validates.
- keep prose, intent, id, surface, and decisions links intact.

Verification:
- mix spec.validate emits ZERO errors for mutagen.coverage (baseline: 8 errors on this file).
- subject status is active in .spec/state.json.

Out of Scope (files): every .spec.md EXCEPT coverage.spec.md; lib/**; test/**.
Allowed touches: .spec/specs/coverage.spec.md only.
Out of Scope (intent): no realized_by bindings (phase2); no code/test edits; do not alter requirement ids or delete requirements.
Merge gate: mix spec.validate (0 errors for mutagen.coverage) && mix compile --warnings-as-errors && mix test

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED

Migrated .spec/specs/coverage.spec.md to the SpecLedEx schema.

Changes (Allowed touches only: .spec/specs/coverage.spec.md + generated .spec/state.json):
- spec-scenarios: reshaped all 12 scenarios (s1-s10, s9a/b/c) to given:/when:/then: arrays (single-element lists, prose preserved verbatim).
- spec-verification: replaced command:/execute: stubs with kind: command + target: <cmd> + execute: true + covers: arrays for v1-v7. (Schema treats target: as the command string for kind: command.)
- spec-meta: status draft -> active.
- Prose, intent, id, surface, decisions links, requirement ids, and requirement set all unchanged. No realized_by bindings added (phase2). No lib/** or test/** edits.

Merge gate (all green):
- mix spec.validate: ZERO errors AND zero warnings for subject mutagen.coverage (baseline was 8 errors). Other unmigrated subjects still show errors, as expected this phase.
- subject status is 'active' in regenerated .spec/state.json.
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors: clean.
- mix test: 640 tests, 0 failures (19 excluded).

Committed a2c28c9 on branch mutagen-835.2.4/migrate-coverage (spec edit + regenerated state.json together).

title: migrate mutagen.coverage to SpecLedEx schema (8 errors)
